Home / About Us
Our Story

Building Trust for Over 20 Years

Old school values meet modern excellence in commercial construction.

The Northway Story

For over two decades, Northway Construction has been the trusted name in commercial construction across the Pacific Northwest. What began as a commitment to quality craftsmanship and honest dealing has grown into a regional construction leader serving clients in Washington and Utah—without losing sight of what matters most: building relationships alongside buildings.

We're not the biggest contractor, and that's by design. We're big enough to handle significant commercial projects with the resources and expertise they demand, yet small enough that you'll work directly with experienced leadership who take personal pride in every project. When you call Northway, you reach decision-makers, not layers of bureaucracy.

Our approach is straightforward: listen to what clients need, provide honest budgets and realistic schedules, deliver quality construction through skilled trade partners, and stand behind our work. It's old school in the best sense—doing what you say you'll do, treating people fairly, and building things that last.

20+
Years in Business
2
Strategic Locations
100+
Projects Completed
2
States Served
Leadership

Experience You Can Trust

Led by Mr. Fry

Under the leadership of Mr. Fry, Northway Construction has built a reputation for delivering projects as promised and exceeding client expectations. With decades of construction experience, our leadership team brings practical knowledge, problem-solving ability, and commitment to client partnership that defines the Northway approach.

Our clients consistently note the value of direct access to experienced leadership. When challenges arise—as they do on any construction project—you're working with people who have the authority and expertise to make decisions, solve problems, and keep your project moving forward.

What Drives Us

Our Core Values

Trust

Trust is earned through consistent delivery and honest dealing. We provide transparent communication, realistic commitments, and construction quality that stands the test of time. Our reputation is built project by project, client by client.

Value

Value isn't about being the cheapest—it's about delivering the best results for your investment. Through smart pre-construction planning, efficient execution, and quality that lasts, we ensure your construction dollars go further.

Service

Responsive service and clear communication make the difference between a good construction experience and a great one. We're accessible, attentive to your needs, and committed to making your project as smooth as construction can be.

Strategic Presence

Two Locations Serving the West

Our two-location strategy allows us to serve clients across the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West with local knowledge and responsive service. Each office brings deep understanding of their regional market, building codes, and construction practices.

Headquarters - Pacific, WA

Address: 1433 Valentine Avenue SE #102, Pacific, WA 98047

Phone: (253) 735-8100

Fax: (253) 987-7483

Email: info@northwayinc.com

Serving the Greater Seattle-Tacoma metro area and throughout Washington state since our founding. Deep roots in Pacific Northwest commercial construction.

Mountain Division - Eagle Mountain, UT

Address: 3535 Ranches Parkway, Suite C, Eagle Mountain, UT 84005

Phone: (385) 208-4433

Expanding our commitment to quality commercial construction into the Utah market. Bringing Pacific Northwest construction excellence to the Mountain West region.

Our Expertise

What We Build

Northway Construction specializes in commercial construction across multiple sectors. Our portfolio includes retail centers and stores, office buildings and corporate spaces, industrial facilities and warehouses, tenant improvements and build-outs, and commercial renovations. We handle projects ranging from 5,000 square feet to over 100,000 square feet—providing the flexibility that larger contractors can't match and the capability that smaller firms don't have.

Service Areas

We serve commercial construction clients throughout Washington state from our Pacific headquarters, with particular strength in the Greater Seattle-Tacoma metro area, South Sound region, and surrounding communities. Our Mountain Division serves the Utah market from Eagle Mountain, providing the same quality and service that built our reputation in the Pacific Northwest.

Why Clients Choose Northway

Direct Owner Involvement

You'll work directly with Mr. Fry and our experienced leadership team. No layers of account managers or bureaucracy—just direct access to the people who make decisions and get things done.

Proven Track Record

Twenty-plus years of commercial construction experience means we've seen it all. The challenges you're facing aren't new to us, and we have the expertise to navigate them successfully.

Regional Expertise

We understand Pacific Northwest construction. Local building codes, weather considerations, permitting processes, and reliable trade partners—regional knowledge makes projects run smoother.

Right-Sized Capability

We're not too big to care about your project and not too small to handle it properly. We have the resources and bonding capacity for substantial commercial projects, but you'll never feel like just another number.

Client Partnership Approach

We view every project as a partnership. Your success is our success. Many of our clients return to us project after project because they appreciate working with a contractor who genuinely cares about delivering great results.

Ready to Work Together?

Experience the Northway difference on your next commercial construction project.

Contact Us Today
